title: Robin Nears Enies Lobby
description: The rescue group closes in on Enies Lobby, with Luffy impatient to reach Robin and the others preparing for battle.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Kaku, Sanji, Chopper. The rescue group closes in on Enies Lobby, with Luffy impatient to reach Robin and the others preparing for battle.
